description: A 100-row table testing multi-page table rendering, row striping, and consistent column widths across pages
visual_assertions: The table header (# | Name | Category | Price | Qty | Status) should have a dark background with white uppercase text
Even rows should have a light gray (#f8fafc) background for striping
All 100 rows should be present, requiring the table to span multiple pages
Column widths should remain consistent across all rows and pages
The '#' column should contain sequential numbers from 1 to 100
Status values should cycle through Pending, Completed, Cancelled, Active
Price values should increase by $12.50 with each row, ending at $1,250.00
